sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hashing (id INT, hash_value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_hashing (id, hash_value) VALUES (1, sha1_digest('testinput1'));
INSERT INTO test_hashing (id, hash_value) VALUES (2, sha1_digest('testinput2'));
UPDATE test_hashing SET hash_value = sha1_digest('testinput3') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hash_value FROM test_hashing WHERE hash_value = sha1_digest('testinput1');
